mapper.sql: id, username, nickname, password, email, phonenumber, sex, avatar, status, del_flag, login_ip, login_date, remark, create_time, update_time
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM sys_user
del_flag = 0
AND username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{username}, '%')
AND nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{nickname}, '%')
AND phonenumber LIKE CONCAT('%', #{phonenumber}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY create_time DESC
LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user
del_flag = 0
AND username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{username}, '%')
AND nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{nickname}, '%')
AND phonenumber LIKE CONCAT('%', #{phonenumber}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
SELECT FROM sys_user WHERE id = #{id} AND del_flag = 0
SELECT FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND del_flag = 0
mapper.delete: UPDATE sys_user SET del_flag = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET password = #{password}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
